name: Team Jayapal
subject: Another busy month for Pramila
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Pramila for Congress
body:
#
Peter, May has been another busy month for Pramila — no surprise there. We're going to tell you all about it below and [**then ask that you chip in toward our end-of-month goal of $55,000 to keep the momentum going.**](https://act.pramilaforcongress.com/go/2635?refcode=em20210528-327&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1&akid=327%2E420207%2EzBImlg)
**What Pramila has been up to:** More than we could possibly list in one email, but we'll attempt to give you the highlights! Pramila has been tirelessly advocating for an urgent end to the filibuster, leading the fight for Medicare expansion, holding Trump and all those involved in the January 6 Capitol attack fully accountable, removing cruel and unnecessary barriers to health care for immigrants through the Health Equity and Access under Law (HEAL) for Immigrant Families Act, and pushing Democrats to go bigger, bolder, and faster on infrastructure.
**Where we're going from here:** Like Pramila's push for a sweeping infrastructure bill that meets the overlapping crises our country faces, the theme of the summer is _bigger, bolder, and faster._ With Mitch McConnell proudly stating that 100% of his focus will be on blocking the Biden administration — Pramila is pushing her colleagues to move forward WITHOUT Republicans on the transformative reforms that voters demanded at the polls last year.
[**But in order to turn up the heat this summer and support Pramila's fight, we need to hit our end-of-month goal of $55,000 by midnight on Monday. Can you make a contribution of $3 or more to our campaign today?**](https://act.pramilaforcongress.com/go/2635?refcode=em20210528-327&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=20&akid=327%2E420207%2EzBImlg)
**[Contribute $3](https://act.pramilaforcongress.com/go/2635?refcode=em20210528-327&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=21&akid=327%2E420207%2EzBImlg)**
Pramila doesn't take corporate PAC money, she's relying 100% on you. Thank you for supporting us at a critical time for our movement.
In solidarity,
Team Jayapal

**[Contribute](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/pj-email-footer?refcode=em20210528-327-footer&t=22&refcode2=327_420207_zBImlg&akid=327%2E420207%2EzBImlg)**
---
[](https://www.facebook.com/pramila.jayapal) | [](https://twitter.com/pramilajayapal) | [](https://www.instagram.com/pramilajayapal/)
Email us: info@pramilaforcongress.com
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is the most important way we keep in touch with people like you, and small-dollar contributions sustain our movement for transformative change. To contribute by check, please address to Pramila for Congress, PO Box 21912, Seattle, WA 98111.
* [Receive Fewer Emails](https://act.pramilaforcongress.com/signup/receive-fewer-emails/)
* [Update My Personal Information](https://act.pramilaforcongress.com/signup/did-your-info-change/?t=23&akid=327%2E420207%2EzBImlg)
* [Unsubscribe](https://act.pramilaforcongress.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=24&akid=327%2E420207%2EzBImlg)

Paid for by Pramila for Congress

subject: Are you on board?
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the Indiana Republican Party
body:
Don’t let the left gain a foothold in Indiana — or all of our success will be erased. Read more >>

View this email in your browser (https://mailchi.mp/indiana/thankful-470514?e=1acd9bb3d6)
https://secure.winred.com/indiana-republican-party/e-eom3-052821?utm_source=HouseFile&utm_campaign=ingop&utm_medium=Email&utm_content=PG_INGOP_E_EOM3_052821&utm_agency=alpha&mc_cid=85ab649aa3&mc_eid=UNIQID

Hoosier Republican,

Governor Holcomb and Indiana Republicans have delivered BIG for Hoosiers, and now we need to make sure that the Democrats don’t reverse all of our progress!

We don’t have to look far to see how disastrous leftist rule is for ordinary citizens just trying to make a living — just look at our neighbors in Democrat-controlled Illinois and Michigan.

They are still struggling to recover from the Covid-19 pandemic and but our GOP leaders stood strong during tough times to deliver for us.

So now the left is desperately trying to bring a blue wave to Indiana. They HATE that we’re making them look bad, and they’re determined to stop it one way or another.

Can you chip in $10 right now to show us that you're on board to keep things going STRONG in Indiana for all Hoosiers? We need to hit our May fundraising goal by MIDNIGHT on Monday night!

End-of-Month Donor Status

Email: dpwillis67@gmail.com
Status: PENDING
Suggested Donation: $10 (https://secure.winred.com/indiana-republican-party/e-eom3-052821?utm_source=HouseFile&utm_campaign=ingop&utm_medium=Email&utm_content=PG_INGOP_E_EOM3_052821&utm_agency=alpha&amount=10&mc_cid=85ab649aa3&mc_eid=UNIQID)

name: Nicolaus Sleister
subject: Help us end Poverty
body:
Poverty is a racial issue!
| | [](http://www.nick4wa.com/?e=4b51f502eb7221f5033bf92012057078&utm_source=nick4wa&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=poverty_01&n=1)
---
Peter, Poverty is a racial issue! Let me explain. When over 90% of the people who live in poverty in Washington state are People of color, there is clearly an issue. Let's look at a couple of cities here in Washington State. When I show you these numbers, you will see why we need fresh ideas for a better Washington. **[We can end poverty, but we need your help. Donate $10 today to help us fight to end poverty.](https://www.nick4wa.com/r?u=sTrCoaT-YmDhY88aC-xe_4EuiRHvEQu_OzjBiZlAGztY8KLSrRcx1k99Tlet_U8GuytfyG8Lp_38neG2BA9ORXu2EeP-LEb3sQdA6xGL9os&e=4b51f502eb7221f5033bf92012057078&utm_source=nick4wa&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=poverty_01&n=2)** **Puyallup:** | Race | Population % | Poverty Rate
---|---|---
Black | 2.9% | **24.4%**
Asian | 6% | 3%
Two or more races | 6.9% | **17.1**
White | 74.4 | 10%
Hispanic | 7.8% | 8.2%
Black Americans are impacted greatly in our state, and it is sad to see that the lowest racial populous in Puyallup has the highest poverty rate.
**Seattle:**
Race | Population % | Poverty Rate
---|---|---
Black | 6.9% | **32.1%**
American Indian | .5% | **36.7%**
Asian | 14% | **17.1%**
Pacific Islander | .4% | **28.6%**
Other | 2.1% | **22.9%**
Two or more races | 6.4% | **15.9%**
White | 63.8% | 8.3%
Hispanic | 6.2% | **17.5%**
Can you see the trend? People of color are **91.7%** of those in poverty in Seattle.
We pulled these from https://www.welfareinfo.org/poverty-rate/washington/
Overall in the state, People of color are **90.2%** of those in poverty.
**[Help us to end poverty, help us to bring fresh ideas for a better Washington to D.C. by donating $10 right now.](https://www.nick4wa.com/r?u=sTrCoaT-YmDhY88aC-xe_4EuiRHvEQu_OzjBiZlAGztY8KLSrRcx1k99Tlet_U8GuytfyG8Lp_38neG2BA9ORXu2EeP-LEb3sQdA6xGL9os&e=4b51f502eb7221f5033bf92012057078&utm_source=nick4wa&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=poverty_01&n=3)**
We've shown you the problems now how do we fix them?
Three things can make a huge impact on how we can end poverty.
First: Raise the minimum wage to $15 an hour and Tax the top 1%, an additional 10% in taxes, and ensure they cannot use loopholes to get out of paying, then put 20% of that tax income towards education and community programs.
Second: End the school-to-prison pipeline by providing kids opportunities to grow and prosper.
Third: Invest in our low-income communities with after-school programs, free healthcare, and community programs.
**[Help us to push forward and work to end poverty. Your donation of $10 can help us to bring Fresh Ideas for a Better Washington.](https://www.nick4wa.com/r?u=sTrCoaT-YmDhY88aC-xe_4EuiRHvEQu_OzjBiZlAGztY8KLSrRcx1k99Tlet_U8GuytfyG8Lp_38neG2BA9ORXu2EeP-LEb3sQdA6xGL9os&e=4b51f502eb7221f5033bf92012057078&utm_source=nick4wa&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=poverty_01&n=4)**
Nicolaus Sleister
Candidate for U.S. Senate
[](http://www.nick4wa.com/?e=4b51f502eb7221f5033bf92012057078&utm_source=nick4wa&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=poverty_01&n=5)[www.Nick4WA.com](https://www.nick4wa.com?e=4b51f502eb7221f5033bf92012057078&utm_source=nick4wa&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=poverty_01&n=6)
[](https://www.nick4wa.com/r?u=27Ax0UmWOX2J8J_QwK9Z6k0Jm8jDE109S7GZfhKfaXmMV0wRNVYoxdZ8n_Nc9D9t&e=4b51f502eb7221f5033bf92012057078&utm_source=nick4wa&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=poverty_01&n=7)
[](https://www.nick4wa.com/r?u=6hyvAYXBs1PELL28GD73y3VOJhhOlfNS34J6bd3r1Y4GA2_ravK9BeRX9PGqMLAf&e=4b51f502eb7221f5033bf92012057078&utm_source=nick4wa&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=poverty_01&n=8)
[](https://www.nick4wa.com/r?u=YqgukYA3Mrlri-dqG7I8TszGt6HvVAjUBT4DK-5VAnA&e=4b51f502eb7221f5033bf92012057078&utm_source=nick4wa&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=poverty_01&n=9)
**Our mailing address is:**
CITIZENS FOR NICOLAUS SLEISTER
17404 Meridian East, Suite F #256
Puyallup, Washington 98375
_Copyright © 2020 CITIZENS FOR NICOLAUS SLEISTER, All rights reserved._
| CITIZENS FOR NICOLAUS SLEISTER · 17404 Meridian East, Suite F #256, Puyallup, WA 98375, United States
This email was sent to [dpwillis67@gmail.com](mailto:dpwillis67@gmail.com). To stop receiving emails, [click here](https://www.nick4wa.com/unsubscribe?e=4b51f502eb7221f5033bf92012057078&utm_source=nick4wa&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=poverty_01&n=10).
You can also keep up with Nicolaus Sleister on [Twitter](https://www.nick4wa.com/r?u=7Sn_jlQ3J2wHxMyMtp8UNC3l6O4KvVEpDWJGhNvZIvg&e=4b51f502eb7221f5033bf92012057078&utm_source=nick4wa&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=poverty_01&n=11) or [Facebook](https://www.nick4wa.com/r?u=27Ax0UmWOX2J8J_QwK9Z6pbBvsAFXrfU42KzBC5nXK943wDZFUJVIn4QFt2h26S5&e=4b51f502eb7221f5033bf92012057078&utm_source=nick4wa&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=poverty_01&n=12).
---

clean_body: Distraction. Half-truths. And media bias. That’s all in a day's work in Washington. And it feels like an endless job to try and break that vicious... Friend, Distraction. Half-truths. And media bias. That’s all in a day's work in Washington. And it feels like an endless job to try and break that vicious cycle. But I believe Congress should serve the people, and it’s so crucial that we push back until they do. That’s why I wanted to circle back and make sure you got the message I sent earlier this week? I’m determined to raise $12,000 before our end-of-month deadline and I was hoping you’d make a contribution now to help me reach it. By donating below, you are making an immediate contribution: If you've saved payment information with Revv or WinRed, your donation will go through automatically. We’ve got a tough round ahead, friend, but if we stick together, I know we can remind our lawmakers who they work for: WE THE PEOPLE! name: Giffords.org
subject: Help us save lives by passing universal background checks!
disclaimer_text: Paid For By Giffords PAC; not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee
body:
#

Friends -
This upcoming weekend families and friends will be gathering to observe Memorial Day.
Memorial Day kicks off summertime — and now that life is returning to a sense of normalcy, this also kicks off social events, summer vacations and a lot of friends and families spending time together.
And we want to make sure that a return to normal doesn’t include deadly shootings terrorizing neighborhoods nationwide.
But just this week, our hearts were broken again after a tragic shooting took the lives of 9 people at the Valley Transportation Authority in San Jose, California.
This violence cannot continue. That’s why we’re working tirelessly to hit our 10,000 contribution goal to help pass universal background checks in the Senate.
We can save lives together and prevent more tragedies from ever happening. But in order to do that we have to hit our goal and we’re hoping you could lend a hand.
[**Can you make a $3 donation to Giffords PAC? We’ll put your contribution to work right away in our efforts to urge the Senate to pass universal background checks.**](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/giffords-em-may21&amount=3&refcode=em210528-1-15?t=1&refcode2=155_3935704_pbt8z0&akid=155%2E3935704%2Epbt8z0)
_If you 've stored your info with ActBlue, we'll process your contribution instantly:_
| | **[Donate $3](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/giffords-em-may21?express_lane=true&amount=3&refcode=em210528-1-15&t=14&refcode2=155_3935704_pbt8z0&akid=155%2E3935704%2Epbt8z0)**
---
****
| **[Donate $25](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/giffords-em-may21?express_lane=true&amount=25&refcode=em210528-1-15&t=15&refcode2=155_3935704_pbt8z0&akid=155%2E3935704%2Epbt8z0)**
---
****
| | **[Donate $50](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/giffords-em-may21?express_lane=true&amount=50&refcode=em210528-1-15&t=16&refcode2=155_3935704_pbt8z0&akid=155%2E3935704%2Epbt8z0)**
---
****
| **[Donate $100](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/giffords-em-may21?express_lane=true&amount=100&refcode=em210528-1-15&t=17&refcode2=155_3935704_pbt8z0&akid=155%2E3935704%2Epbt8z0)**
---
****
| | **[Donate $250](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/giffords-em-may21?express_lane=true&amount=250&refcode=em210528-1-15&t=18&refcode2=155_3935704_pbt8z0&akid=155%2E3935704%2Epbt8z0)**
---
****
| **[Other Amount](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/giffords-em-may21?express_lane=true&refcode=em210528-1-15&t=19&refcode2=155_3935704_pbt8z0&akid=155%2E3935704%2Epbt8z0)**
---
****
While we are working hard to get this legislation passed, the NRA is also doing everything they can to stop us. They’ve spent millions of dollars on ads and have spread lies trying to unravel decades of commonsense gun safety legislation.
As more Americans begin to gather in large groups, we need to ensure that our safety is being prioritized and that lives are being saved.
Your donation towards our May contribution goal is a message to Congress that Americans want universal background checks passed right now so that we can enjoy our gatherings and feel safe as life returns to normal.
Thank you for helping us save lives.
Team Giffords
**[DONATE NOW](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/giffords-em-may21?refcode=em210528-1-15&t=20&refcode2=155_3935704_pbt8z0&akid=155%2E3935704%2Epbt8z0)**

We try to send only the most important information and opportunities to participate via email, but click [here](https://go.giffords.org/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=21&akid=155%2E3935704%2Epbt8z0) if you'd like to unsubscribe. Giffords PAC was started to support elected officials who step up to fight the gun violence epidemic. Thank you for standing with Gabby and Mark.

name: Alert via SarahForWisconsin.com
subject: Ron Johnson is blocking legislation -- again
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY SARAH FOR WISCONSIN
body:
Ron Johnson is up to his obstructionist antics again, Peter. Check this out: [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/29905803/287894251/-49048448?gpsid=50_130_19131&refcode=em21_210528_RoJoRR_fnd_gq_act__AvSfW_ettx&utm_campaign=em21_210528_RoJoRR_fnd_gq_act__AvSfW_ettx&utm_medium=email&utm_source=sgod&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84ODI4NSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIwM2VjNGUxZC1lYmJmLWViMTEtYTdhZC01MDFhYzU3YjhmYTciLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=oP1Y-WDNVi7eANfxXUIy-NY3LHNiG6pFdv9K1xv-Wr4=)

Last night, Ron Johnson held up critical, bipartisan legislation -- including a bill to give Wisconsin workers a leg-up on China, and a January 6 Commission to investigate the violent insurrection -- all to score political points with Trump!

**[If you're as sick of Ron Johnson's stunts as we are, chip in $5 to our grassroots campaign to take him down. name: Jennifer Carroll Foy
subject: thank you and next steps
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Jennifer Carroll Foy for Governor
body:
| | |
Another week down. Wow! Time is going fast.

I wanted to say thank you for all your support to help my campaign have a strong showing for our final filing deadline. This was a critical step and I’m appreciative of all your support.

Another critical step is our outreach for these final two weekends before the primary. We can tell by polling and early voting totals that there will likely be a rush to vote after the holiday weekend.

I need your help to have the people power to connect with voters for these final weeks.

* In Person Canvassing: [**https://bit.ly/JCFGOTV**](https://u1584542.ct.sendgrid.net/ss/c/SVVf6UGddUySPN6znLYVWlNcLujgsWCWC-VQeGgrcRfNgSt7QOrpdQmDnQmNgZkPWwljH2N30CKJE0YiC2xvPFMMZ_XvjoqPmOqYVDrJXdKhvtBStvdJUWWufQWPwzG41SSo-HRbq_ZRuk9I81LQ8PhvoKdp0kD55oaTHJ3alWDyFLMz-_TglTZnO-bOh5fh40iRwoLqSJH-3cS0tyhKI01SVXNXWTiYbDSkoRzlwJ6PhrPMaEBUE8FjCEcNIcrY/3ca/C9GCE4RCQ6S1hbyh8oyD7Q/h0/CggMcpqNy3OVqjJzZF26D4l5YmbcuBWQixiW_y6EHrU)

>From the bottom of my heart, thank you!

Jennifer

* * *
_Jennifer Carroll Foy was born and raised in Petersburg. In 2017, she flipped a Republican district as a first-time candidate pregnant with twins. During her time as Delegate, Jennifer championed the ratification of the Equal Rights Amendment, helped expand Medicaid to 400,000 Virginians, and advocated for the Commonwealth’s most vulnerable communities.

She has a career of public service and it started long before 2017. As a public defender, Jennifer helped give a voice to the often voiceless — children, people suffering from addiction, those experiencing homelessness, those with mental illness, and the poor.

Now she’s running to be the first woman elected Governor of Virginia and serve as the first Black woman to be governor nationwide. **[Help her make history. **Indiana is leading the way out of the pandemic behind Governor Holcomb’s common sense conservative policies that put Hoosiers first –– and politics last.**

clean_body: While other states continue to lag behind, Indiana’s economy is firing on all cylinders, records are being broken, and the great Hoosier comeback... Hey friend, this is Jake. While other states continue to lag behind, Indiana’s economy is firing on all cylinders, records are being broken, and the great Hoosier comeback is turning heads and making headlines all across the globe. And it’s all thanks to Governor Holcomb’s common sense conservative leadership. We’re on track to make 2021 another banner year with record investments in education, infrastructure, and job creation. But here’s the bottom line, friend. We can’t stop here. We need to, and we need your help to do it. With Hoosiers like you on board, the sky is the limit and there’s no telling what we’ll be able to accomplish next. Click the link below to keep Indiana moving in the right direction: Thank you, Jake Oakman \------------ begin forwarded message ----------- To: Subject: The proof is in the pudding From: Holcomb Crew | | | ---|---|--- Friend, Indiana is leading the way out of the pandemic behind Governor Holcomb’s common sense conservative policies that put Hoosiers first –– and politics last. Jobs are being created. Businesses are booming. Records are being broken. Meanwhile in other states, failing liberal policies are hurting economies and making it more difficult for American families and businesses to recover. Workers are still sitting at home. Businesses are struggling to make ends meet. Dismal records that should never be broken are being broken! Friend, conservative leadership works, and the proof is in the pudding. The great Hoosier comeback is in full swing, and we’re on track to make 2021 another banner year with historic investments in education, infrastructure, and job creation initiatives. But we can’t stop here, and that’s why we’re challenging Hoosiers to continue pressing forward as One Indianaas we close out this month. With your help, we can finish the work that we’ve started together and keep Indiana firing on all cylinders. Will you chip in below to keep Indiana’s momentum going strong? Thank you for all that you do, friend. We’ll be in touch soon. \- Holcomb Crew | | | | | Paid for by Eric Holcomb for Indiana. © Copyright 2021. | Friend,

I know it’s the Friday before a three-day weekend, so I’ll keep this brief: [_**before you sign off, can you contribute to my campaign today so we can hit our May fundraising goal?**_](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/29907012/287898000/267654163?refcode=BLU-SJC-20210528-1-EM&amount=25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84OTMxMyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI1OWQxOGE5Ny1lZWJmLWViMTEtYTdhZC01MDFhYzU3YjhmYTciLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=tDYU5L7LEUs-oAg-i13J1zViRxMdO7Hrsxh02q5wOuQ=)

In Congress, my Democratic colleagues and I are working hard to provide much-needed relief to Americans suffering from the economic fallout of this pandemic. I am proud to be a leader on important initiatives like the Universal Child Care and Early Learning Act and the Green New Deal.

**To continue making progress on these crucial issues, Democrats must keep the House majority next year — and we need your help to do it. [_I hope you’ll take a moment today to support my efforts by making a contribution before you sign off for the holiday weekend._](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/29907013/287898001/267654163?refcode=BLU-SJC-20210528-1-EM&amount=25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84OTMxMyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI1OWQxOGE5Ny1lZWJmLWViMTEtYTdhZC01MDFhYzU3YjhmYTciLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=tDYU5L7LEUs-oAg-i13J1zViRxMdO7Hrsxh02q5wOuQ=)

We set an ambitious goal to collect 1,000 contributions before our end-of-month deadline, and I’m hoping you can help us get there.

[_Anything you can give will help in my efforts to keep the House blue in 2022!_](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/29907014/287898002/267654163?refcode=BLU-SJC-20210528-1-EM&amount=25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84OTMxMyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI1OWQxOGE5Ny1lZWJmLWViMTEtYTdhZC01MDFhYzU3YjhmYTciLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=tDYU5L7LEUs-oAg-i13J1zViRxMdO7Hrsxh02q5wOuQ=)**

name: =?utf-8?Q?Jonathan=20at=20The=20NICPAC=20Team?=
subject: A tough hill to climb
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the NICPAC (NICPAC
body:
Every time Nicole makes the news, we need to be there to hold her accountable. | | | [View this email in your browser](https://us7.campaign-archive.com/?u=2a7b3c18864ba2494a25b6d68&id=17e6f334ed&e=07cb4a6a22)
---
| | [ ](https://nicpac.us7.list-manage.com/track/click?u=2a7b3c18864ba2494a25b6d68&id=eb0a5fba07&e=07cb4a6a22)
---
| |
#
Dear Peter,

As New York City’s first community-led Super PAC, we have a tough hill to climb to get our Congresswoman out of office.

That's why every time Nicole Malliotakis makes the news, we need to be there to hold her accountable. Every time she makes a bad vote, we need to be there making sure folks know.

To do that, we need to fundraise for billboards, outreach, ads and more.

[**It might not seem this way, but 2022 is just around the corner. Can you chip in $2.22 to help our community get the message out? >>**](https://nicpac.us7.list-manage.com/track/click?u=2a7b3c18864ba2494a25b6d68&id=088a278a12&e=07cb4a6a22)

Nicole betrayed our country with her vote on 1/6. She's complicit in the insurrection, and continues failing to serve our district. We deserve better - and with your help, we’re going to get it.

Sincerely,

Jonathan
The NICPAC Team

---
|
---
| **Look, we can’t do this without you.** Nicole Malliotakis is going to have all the conspiracy theorists sending money her way because she’s one of them. If we want to take back this district and restore civility, [it’s up to us](https://nicpac.us7.list-manage.com/track/click?u=2a7b3c18864ba2494a25b6d68&id=eb0a5fba07&e=07cb4a6a22).

That's why every time Nicole Malliotakis makes the news, we need to be there to hold her accountable. Every time she makes a bad vote, we need to be there making sure folks know. To do that, we need to fundraise for billboards, outreach, ads and more. Nicole betrayed our country with her vote on 1/6. She's complicit in the insurrection, and continues failing to serve our district. We deserve better - and with your help, we’re going to get it. Sincerely, Jonathan The NICPAC Team | | Look, we can’t do this without you. Nicole Malliotakis is going to have all the conspiracy theorists sending money her way because she’s one of them. If we want to take back this district and restore civility, . | | Paid for by the NICPAC (NICPAC.org) and not authorized by any candidate or candidate’s committee. | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | mailto:info@nicpac.org | Copyright © 2021 NICPAC, All rights reserved.

Since Biden took office:

1. Critical Race Theory training which President Trump banned was reinstated.
2. Biden's Defense Secretary called for taxpayer funded gender reassignment surgery for soldiers.
3. A Lieutenant Commander in Space Force was fired for warning about Marxism in our military.
4. The U.S. Navy added highly partisan Marxist and "antiracist" literature to their reading program.

We should be preparing America's soldiers to fight and win battles - NOT become Social Justice Warriors.
[I need your help to send a message to Biden and the Democrats in Congress who are forcing our military leaders to cave into this radical agenda.](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001_hiCnY0s3wMXSs0uVnz6g4QzzjwPll-axkv6P8B-3Vfku9aK3XJ2--HXmUF0_2SRdCbsXX-6p2Gqt_tB2EP0Qwog3bwJRH_5lh2zfJdB6eUWaX77Fv2f8ZttwvHcoGAFORX5Dmx4RmCNKMRaG9af5d_SaW1Z7BFfzEzjbB3k1UiD3Hf3MstfuBu7pteJinvABWZs0Co_TxLo-yAGd62xRI4Aw8PyQCaEoYOh22YeVNoJtu3L55u0XZjxhGD_cM37juHf2GPT5YkMN-NDaBHH6U02kKEWoxnZlWHBkCg2do_-wIx-kuwiYg==&c=2TnjQFSeA0_ewvSWOYNULtdg0-YC66GB8DzHYOhJvN98vQKtSLejwg==&ch=NfY6ZuszABCh5iwD5bg3LvvmyRKFhQguVjgz06IJR9VMpQtGGFD1QQ==)
We will not stand by as our military becomes another institution crippled by woke political correctness. No more critical race theory, no more identity politics, no more political witch hunts. We've had enough.
[Sign the petition.](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001_hiCnY0s3wMXSs0uVnz6g4QzzjwPll-axkv6P8B-3Vfku9aK3XJ2--HXmUF0_2SRdCbsXX-6p2Gqt_tB2EP0Qwog3bwJRH_5lh2zfJdB6eUWaX77Fv2f8ZttwvHcoGAFORX5Dmx4RmCNKMRaG9af5d_SaW1Z7BFfzEzjbB3k1UiD3Hf3MstfuBu7pteJinvABWZs0Co_TxLo-yAGd62xRI4Aw8PyQCaEoYOh22YeVNoJtu3L55u0XZjxhGD_cM37juHf2GPT5YkMN-NDaBHH6U02kKEWoxnZlWHBkCg2do_-wIx-kuwiYg==&c=2TnjQFSeA0_ewvSWOYNULtdg0-YC66GB8DzHYOhJvN98vQKtSLejwg==&ch=NfY6ZuszABCh5iwD5bg3LvvmyRKFhQguVjgz06IJR9VMpQtGGFD1QQ==) Stop radical, Marxist ideology from invading our Armed Forces.

| | Just a few minutes ago, the U.S. Senate failed to approve a bipartisan commission to investigate the insurrection at the U.S. Capitol on January 6th. The vote was 54 to 35. But even though a bipartisan majority — including six Republicans — voted in favor of the commission, it failed. Last week, a bipartisan majority in the House — including 35 Republicans — voted for the commission. **This is a failure of democracy.** We have to double down on everything we are doing. We have to organize, communicate, and build the grassroots movement we need to uphold our democracy. That should have started with this commission. We need to fully understand what occurred on January 6th to make sure that it never happens again. [**Right now, show your commitment to this fight by chipping in $3. clean_body: | | | Just a few minutes ago, the U.S. Senate failed to approve a bipartisan commission to investigate the insurrection at the U.S. Capitol on January 6th. The vote was 54 to 35. But even though a bipartisan majority — including six Republicans — voted in favor of the commission, it failed. Last week, a bipartisan majority in the House — including 35 Republicans — voted for the commission. This is a failure of democracy. We have to double down on everything we are doing. We have to organize, communicate, and build the grassroots movement we need to uphold our democracy. That should have started with this commission. We need to fully understand what occurred on January 6th to make sure that it never happens again. = = Together, we can protect and restore our democracy. [](http://links.makingamericathegreatest.com/u/click?_t=79fa4a3daf024a0a886c5b498ff32e32&_m=5bf0dee1c6dc4922a1817a412cb7d46e&_e=9gp0d6hq-3pJ9QHzNQlbWmy4rM0t_ypq1JSD7Iyca6iqDWBzzOjKIx2risU1p66CHKV1tC_JgdxJp0id1F-BbAPaGCNubKOpVuuulZ71cfCQoxdd9I14liYOc7mC_cs8ko3XFVNhF_E8XF_daPt3cX3F0N4EYMuURTdty7__8KeVuS3SZVj5oybFK1DLYb6hsWRHG6xdcm9RET3v5zQy5FznOuRCyybD92pB5zrwbV68-HZdFJKRVQxdgobWZOD-JLP__UhKKJA7pVR-l06z-M4-b5SozF9pXRtl-WiH9OpsWVk2zw-i3Z-cSni4XgHp60oHeGObByFWLo1wUmynLC26mhp_emdMMIzXc3UNpN5MBXdMU3dEDp5wU1kEcMzTKQA4_kIp9NxVanlvHOdZrfvI4yqktNlCnTvw5PpoXhF4troPs5-Owo68UqBGU3JLYCqZiVMveyUnC0-wsxjFqn378J1Aq5RIbpWC_ggzM9_UTpc6TSYQXdbRZ5J9YeFeuwblR_XHp2wyrfh7V0S9FljedCwAIbOuPyFO5lRHd8QZMYbG7HmonEZJsjWoO_zEYePU1nNqQYG7z0cfvupSUR-JkRLe1pDDHwUBLClVuwRj6RB4xBbgC8SFuDgFlfl3yHMpwvKQZ7hr24BLM81THg%3D%3D)

_**KEEP READING BELOW**_

Fellow American,

On June 28th and again on July 3rd, 2020 the Second Amendment to the United States Constitution saved the life of not only myself, but my wife’s life.

When the angry Fascist Black Lives Matter mob came marching toward our home, we did what many of you reading this email right now would do: w**e grabbed our guns to protect our home and our lives**.

**Turns out our Founding Fathers were onto something** when they decided to prominently place Americans’ rights to keep and bear arms into the Constitution.

**[My name is Mark McCloskey and I’m running for the United States Senate to protect our Second Amendment rights which are under attack from President Biden and Washington Democrats.](http://links.makingamericathegreatest.com/u/click?_t=79fa4a3daf024a0a886c5b498ff32e32&_m=5bf0dee1c6dc4922a1817a412cb7d46e&_e=9gp0d6hq-3pJ9QHzNQlbWmy4rM0t_ypq1JSD7Iyca6iqDWBzzOjKIx2risU1p66CHKV1tC_JgdxJp0id1F-BbAPaGCNubKOpVuuulZ71cfCQoxdd9I14liYOc7mC_cs8ko3XFVNhF_E8XF_daPt3cX3F0N4EYMuURTdty7__8KeVuS3SZVj5oybFK1DLYb6hsWRHG6xdcm9RET3v5zQy5FznOuRCyybD92pB5zrwbV68-HZdFJKRVQxdgobWZOD-JLP__UhKKJA7pVR-l06z-M4-b5SozF9pXRtl-WiH9OpsWVk2zw-i3Z-cSni4XgHp60oHeGObByFWLo1wUmynLC26mhp_emdMMIzXc3UNpN5MBXdMU3dEDp5wU1kEcMzTKQA4_kIp9NxVanlvHOdZrfvI4yqktNlCnTvw5PpoXhF4troPs5-Owo68UqBGU3JLhlyGj5uW3HYsDjcWjgPm0rg-gKkBJFraghMYD-E91Z-EQvIm9LBCBuU-qYkx1wBHDgFacnvUF_jpeNgWv_VwfwHaLVtRP9t-ge03CzrtfbYfsdaqrLJT02JwDyW_XabHDui-VkqarK82bhw6t71oXP9T65fRp7OZcc-PypwwLvBzDKdJY9HVNs-ACfUFeQp-B1L1uVyJ4s9HdlD6NqEFag%3D%3D)**

**[I’m gathering signatures for a petition I’m planning to submit in-person to the White House in support of 2A rights and I’m asking you to add your name today.](http://links.makingamericathegreatest.com/u/click?_t=79fa4a3daf024a0a886c5b498ff32e32&_m=5bf0dee1c6dc4922a1817a412cb7d46e&_e=9gp0d6hq-3pJ9QHzNQlbWmy4rM0t_ypq1JSD7Iyca6iqDWBzzOjKIx2risU1p66CHKV1tC_JgdxJp0id1F-BbAPaGCNubKOpVuuulZ71cfCQoxdd9I14liYOc7mC_cs8ko3XFVNhF_E8XF_daPt3cX3F0N4EYMuURTdty7__8KeVuS3SZVj5oybFK1DLYb6hsWRHG6xdcm9RET3v5zQy5FznOuRCyybD92pB5zrwbV68-HZdFJKRVQxdgobWZOD-JLP__UhKKJA7pVR-l06z-M4-b5SozF9pXRtl-WiH9OpsWVk2zw-i3Z-cSni4XgHp60oHeGObByFWLo1wUmynLC26mhp_emdMMIzXc3UNpN5MBXdMU3dEDp5wU1kEcMzTKQA4_kIp9NxVanlvHOdZrfvI4yqktNlCnTvw5PpoXhF4troPs5-Owo68UqBGU3JLzTLGfwfFDcfloa3My6PorJVrXxCidOlynFuDLrgS7PMuMZI5VHVfWQHHQsGDusQ92z3SQS3_uusfwm03vI-oQin1v9CW1tFmkv62FAAgEf1sEkkS6PGAihiRqa2XZw1QNWWYJxEGGYtpD3hJxro5TU9a4Bn7PQ05GnRx5FpI_5YP6EIb2-u3mD7j_QQBFq7NNPAmX-XB1BXcwUVvx6uf4A%3D%3D)** Typically, the White House won’t acknowledge a petition with less than 100,000 signatures; that’s a lofty goal, but **if you and everyone reading this email today signed on** , we would quickly reach our goal.

[](http://links.makingamericathegreatest.com/u/click?_t=79fa4a3daf024a0a886c5b498ff32e32&_m=5bf0dee1c6dc4922a1817a412cb7d46e&_e=9gp0d6hq-3pJ9QHzNQlbWmy4rM0t_ypq1JSD7Iyca6iqDWBzzOjKIx2risU1p66CHKV1tC_JgdxJp0id1F-BbAPaGCNubKOpVuuulZ71cfCQoxdd9I14liYOc7mC_cs8ko3XFVNhF_E8XF_daPt3cX3F0N4EYMuURTdty7__8KeVuS3SZVj5oybFK1DLYb6hsWRHG6xdcm9RET3v5zQy5FznOuRCyybD92pB5zrwbV68-HZdFJKRVQxdgobWZOD-JLP__UhKKJA7pVR-l06z-M4-b5SozF9pXRtl-WiH9OpsWVk2zw-i3Z-cSni4XgHp60oHeGObByFWLo1wUmynLC26mhp_emdMMIzXc3UNpN5MBXdMU3dEDp5wU1kEcMzTKQA4_kIp9NxVanlvHOdZrfvI4yqktNlCnTvw5PpoXhF4troPs5-Owo68UqBGU3JLSiSRQZkyP7EFmBJZo8c-k8vILnB7xFEO-RWrv6jEpohpChBI4pd5asQPGnV2DuzfY0H9t_w8FCzec-3syg_aZnVyWTh_E6Z50KYLWmdgJ8Y6_wwroO9ipVCAZrB2oGxxCAsSS8-_tVjNjJ-QdlzUEuIW4j16R-vndM-eRZyOuG4Qf78tJuxrFQzk0vbjq0wG-NHJ_g4_k5ehksXfCh2u9g%3D%3D)
**The Supreme Court hasn’t banned assault rifles yet, but if President Biden stacks the Supreme Court as Nancy Pelosi and Chuck Schumer are urging him to do, it will only be a matter of time.**

As I witnessed last summer from the front porch of my home, **people can have the best intentions in the world, but if you’re in a group of people and one person starts acting out, things can get out of control pretty quickly**.

Some may say that I’m not the real deal or that I’m trying to ride a viral moment to the Senate. That would be false. My wife Patricia and I have spent a considerable amount of time ensuring a bill in the Missouri legislature– which would prevent state law enforcement officials from enforcing federal laws that would prohibit the manufacture, ownership and use of firearms –passed into law.

I will never back down. I may be running for Senate in Missouri, but I’m running to be a senator for all freedom-loving Americans.

**[I hope you’ll sign my petition to protect the Second Amendment today. I'm circulating a petition to take to the White House in defense of our 2A rights VOTE NOW &NDASH; We're looking for 50,000 conservatives to answer this question: Does Trump still lead the Republican Party? | ABOUT THIS EMAIL : PETITION TO PROTECT THE 2ND AMENDMENT WHY THIS MATTERS: Our 2A rights are under attack from the far Left and President Biden ABOUT ME: Mark McCloskey. Candidate for U.S. Senate. Defended my home from FASCIST BLM mob. . KEEP READING BELOW Fellow American, On June 28th and again on July 3rd, 2020 the Second Amendment to the United States Constitution saved the life of not only myself, but my wife’s life. When the angry Fascist Black Lives Matter mob came marching toward our home, we did what many of you reading this email right now would do: we grabbed our guns to protect our home and our lives. Turns out our Founding Fathers were onto something when they decided to prominently place Americans’ rights to keep and bear arms into the Constitution. Typically, the White House won’t acknowledge a petition with less than 100,000 signatures; that’s a lofty goal, but if you and everyone reading this email today signed on , we would quickly reach our goal. The Supreme Court hasn’t banned assault rifles yet, but if President Biden stacks the Supreme Court as Nancy Pelosi and Chuck Schumer are urging him to do, it will only be a matter of time. As I witnessed last summer from the front porch of my home, people can have the best intentions in the world, but if you’re in a group of people and one person starts acting out, things can get out of control pretty quickly. Some may say that I’m not the real deal or that I’m trying to ride a viral moment to the Senate. That would be false. My wife Patricia and I have spent a considerable amount of time ensuring a bill in the Missouri legislature– which would prevent state law enforcement officials from enforcing federal laws that would prohibit the manufacture, ownership and use of firearms –passed into law. I will never back down. I may be running for Senate in Missouri, but I’m running to be a senator for all freedom-loving Americans. For America, Mark McCloskey Republican Candidate for United States Senate | | On June 28, 2020, and then again on July 3, 2020, he and Patty held off a violent mob through the exercise of their 2nd Amendment rights. body:
#

Friends — we promise not to take up too much of your time.
We have one ask to make before the weekend: [**If you are able, will you make a $3 donation to our people-powered campaign to help us hit our 50,000 contribution goal?**](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mek-em-may21?refcode=em210528-1-15&t=1&refcode2=685_6688874_0YVewh&akid=685%2E6688874%2E0YVewh)
So much is at stake in 2022. If we want to hold the Senate and re-elect Mark, we have to start building the foundation now.
So regardless of what you’re able to donate, any amount will go a long way towards helping Mark hold this seat.
Thank you for your continued support and have a good weekend!
Team Kelly

Paid For By Mark Kelly for Senate
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is a very important way we communicate with supporters like you, but if you want to, you can [ unsubscribe here](https://act.markkelly.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe?t=2&akid=685%2E6688874%2E0YVewh).
Mark Kelly was a Captain in the U.S. Navy and astronaut. Use of his military rank, job titles and photographs in uniform does not imply endorsement by the Department of the Navy or Department of Defense and reference to NASA does not imply endorsement by the National Aeronautics and Space Administration.

Friend,
---
My Finance Team and I looked over Tony Evers’ fundraising reports to set our monthly budgets.
---
_As it stands, we still need to raise another $12,460 to ensure we reach our goal and are able to compete with Governor Evers and Democrats in fundraising._
---
Now that the governor’s race has been rated a toss-up, beating Governor Evers and Democrats in fundraising is our chance to take the upper hand in this election.
---
That’s why I’ve authorized a MATCH for the next 30 minutes on all contributions.
---

clean_body: That’s how we arrived at our new goal. | Friend, My Finance Team and I looked over Tony Evers’ fundraising reports to set our monthly budgets. As it stands, we still need to raise another $12,460 to ensure we reach our goal and are able to compete with Governor Evers and Democrats in fundraising. Now that the governor’s race has been rated a toss-up, beating Governor Evers and Democrats in fundraising is our chance to take the upper hand in this election. That’s why I’ve authorized a MATCH for the next 30 minutes on all contributions. Thank you, Rebecca Kleefisch Paid for by Rebecca PAC PO Box 620215, Middleton, WI 53562

We can stop things from going from bad to worse, but only with your help. Read more >>
[](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/282e4263e04f74c17c94c760ea83e7c0/34143/232274606fe5e0e4/1f3fc567c5f6d703c3d6b838967d376c/34143) Dear Peter, Since Joe Biden and Nancy Pelosi took over in Washington, things have gotten pretty bad. Inflation is back because the Democrats passed a wasteful stimulus bill, and they still have billions in socialist legislation they’re attempting to pass. I’ve been able to visit the border, and it’s in complete chaos. Yet Joe Biden and his administration are nowhere to be seen. Instead, they’re talking about $6 TRILLION spending sprees that will only burden the American people with more inflation and more debt. Gas prices are up, tension in the Middle East is high, and the economy still hasn’t recovered from the COVID pandemic and shutdowns. **I’ve been working to STOP the left’s extreme agenda at every turn. This month I released the only budget the House has seen in over 2 years. It’s conservative. It’s full of common sense. And it balances the budget in 5 years. ** Needless to say, I have an uphill climb to let it be heard. **[That’s why it’s critical that I have your support immediately](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/282e4263e04f74c17c94c760ea83e7c0/34143/232274606fe5e0e4/1e776b05709ed990c3d6b838967d376c/34143). ** We’re up against a tight timeline right now to meet our end-of-month fundraising goal for May. **[Will you please RUSH a donation of ANY amount to help us fight back against the leftist insanity in D.C.?](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/282e4263e04f74c17c94c760ea83e7c0/34143/232274606fe5e0e4/7630328025804fc7c3d6b838967d376c/34143)** [**RUSH $5 NOW >>**](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/282e4263e04f74c17c94c760ea83e7c0/34143/232274606fe5e0e4/73f8778aa64caa03c3d6b838967d376c/34143) [**RUSH $10 NOW >**](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/282e4263e04f74c17c94c760ea83e7c0/34143/232274606fe5e0e4/f930ecb71108014fc3d6b838967d376c/34143) [**RUSH $25 NOW >>**](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/282e4263e04f74c17c94c760ea83e7c0/34143/232274606fe5e0e4/078c5b9f18f51d3ac3d6b838967d376c/34143) [**RUSH $50 NOW >>**](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/282e4263e04f74c17c94c760ea83e7c0/34143/232274606fe5e0e4/bc3ccec70bcf399bc3d6b838967d376c/34143) [**RUSH ANY NOW >>**](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/282e4263e04f74c17c94c760ea83e7c0/34143/232274606fe5e0e4/7cbe8608791513abc3d6b838967d376c/34143) We need all donations to be received by MIDNIGHT on Monday for them to count towards our goal, so please don’t wait. The progress we’ve made has been historic, but the work isn’t done." = | | = Mark has been the most progressive Attorney General in the history of Virginia and we need your help to keep him in office working for us.** But if you'd like to receive fewer emails, we understand. Team -

I just wanted to take a minute out of your day to welcome you to our new 2022 newsletter! This newsletter will serve as a way for you all to stay updated on what is happening with the campaign! If you have any questions or would like to get involved, check out our links below or email info@schellerforcongress.com.

This past week, was the Primary Election in Pennsylvania and we now know who our Republican candidates will be in the fall. Below I am pictured with Lehigh County Commissioner candidates Marjulee Colon and Jacqueline Rivera as well as Allentown Mayor candidate, Tim Ramos!

I hope you will all join me in supporting them and volunteering to make their campaigns successful! Please stay up to date with my social media and website as we will be adding events in support of these candidates over the Summer!

|
---
**Why doesn't Susan Wild stand with Israel? **

This week, Susan Wild voted twice against Republican-backed bills supporting Israel. These bills included $500 million in defense including Iron Dome and a bill that would have placed sanctions on sponsors of Hamas which passed bipartisan in the previous session of Congress. Susan Wild has sold this district out to the Progressive Left and she now stands with "Squad" members Ilhan Omar and Rashida Talib.

It also took Susan Wild over a week to call Hamas a terrorist organization, and only after I had to ask her on Twitter because she "accidentally" left it out of her original statement.

We need leaders who are strong supporters of Israel and when I am elected I promise to never back down. On Sunday, I stood with our Ally Israel, the only Democracy in the Middle East, and the only Jewish state in the entire World at the "Stand with Israel" rally in Philadelphia. Where was Susan Wild? She was noticeably absent, and probably to keep her collegues in the "Squad" happy.

**Check out my full statement regarding the situation in the Middle East and pictures from the "Stand with Israel" rally below!**

|

|
---
|
---
**Did you know that Susan Wild is a Co-Sponsor of Unconstitutional H.R.51?**

If you don't know much about this bill, that is because Progressives like Susan Wild don't want you to become aware of their blatant power grab. H.R. 51 is the bill that would make Washington D.C. the 51st State in the United States of America and is a key part of the radical leftist agenda to reshape America along with H.R. 1, defunding the police, the Green New Deal, and packing the Supreme Court.

There are many problems with H.R. 51 and the first is that its flatly unconstitutional. Framers of the Constitution and the 23rd Amendment had a clear vision that the seat of the Federal government should not have the same powers as a state; namely Congressional Representation. Without getting into details, Article 1, Section 8, Clause 17 of the Constitution and the 23rd Amendment clearly convey this intent.

Based on the demographics of DC, as a state it would be overwhelmingly Democrat. You don’t have to dig deep to understand why the Progressive Democrats want to grant DC Statehood. POWER & MONEY!

1\. Power - Democrats want 2 more Senate seats so that they can jam through progressive legislation like Green New Deal, packing the Supreme Court, Defunding the Police, and eliminating the filibuster. Once these are done, the power of our government will be tyrannical.
2\. Money - Having this power, they can pass any legislation and put any tax burden on citizens they want, even one that will confiscate and redistribute hard earned wealth and assets and create an elite class within society, that of the government.

A final note. If H.R. 51 is clearly unconstitutional requiring significant change to our Constitution, **How can Rep. Susan Wild and the Progressives vote for Unconstitutional H.R. 51 without breaking their oath to uphold our Constitution? That answer is simple: They can’t.**

|
---
**Update from the District!**

I spent Saturday afternoon on Main Street in Northampton meeting small business owners, restaurant owners, and the good people from all walks of life who call the Lehigh Valley their home. Check out the photos below!

|
---

Be sure to keep an eye out for future updates form the campaign and future events!

Onward to victory,

Lisa Scheller
Candidate for Congress

subject: CNN: Even with Republican infighting, Democrats face significant headwinds in 2022
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Dr. Kim Schrier for Congress
body:
**Even with Republican infighting, Democrats face significant headwinds in 2022**
\-- _CNN_ , 5/14/21 Holding on to our House majority is going to be tough, Peter.

Last election, Republicans fell just five seats short of the House majority and historical trends show they're in a good position to win back next year. **On average, the president's party loses 27 seats in the midterm elections.**

National Republicans are wasting no time preparing for the midterms and they've named Kim's seat a top target to flip. That's why we need to lay the groundwork right now if we're going to keep Kim in Congress fighting for the issues that matter most to us.

clean_body: Even with Republican infighting, Democrats face significant headwinds in 2022 \-- CNN , 5/14/21 Holding on to our House majority is going to be tough, Peter. Last election, Republicans fell just five seats short of the House majority and historical trends show they're in a good position to win back next year. On average, the president's party loses 27 seats in the midterm elections. National Republicans are wasting no time preparing for the midterms and they've named Kim's seat a top target to flip. That's why we need to lay the groundwork right now if we're going to keep Kim in Congress fighting for the issues that matter most to us. clean_body: He should’ve known better... | Peter, George Soros funded a prosecutor to take down Navy SEAL Eric Greitens, who’s a fearless defender of President Trump. But Soros should have known better than to go after a Navy SEAL. Eric is now running for the OPEN Senate seat to build President Trump a new America First majority in the Senate. Meanwhile, Soros’ prosecutor may lose her law license. Now, with hours to go until the end-of-month deadline, I need your help raising the remaining $29,335 of our May goal to stop Soros from buying this Senate seat. I decided to join Eric Greitens’ campaign as his National Chair after seeing how fearlessly he stands up to the Left. At a time when Republicans are getting cancelled, slandered, and attacked for their beliefs, we need to support conservatives who have the courage to stand their ground. As a Navy SEAL, Eric embodies that courage. Now, he needs our help winning this OPEN Senate race to end Kamala’s majority and build a new majority for President Trump that will always put America first. Thank you, Kimberly Guilfoyle National Chair Greitens for U.S. Senate Paid for by Greitens for U.S. Senate PO Box 989, Chesterfield, MO 63006 Military images and information do not imply endorsement by DOD [Department of Defense] or any service branch.

subject: We've got some catching up to do
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY JAY INSLEE FOR WASHINGTON (D)

Deadline: today at midnight.

| [](https://links.e.jayinslee.com/els/v2/RaxXsVqN00fD/T2prQ2lKdzRKbkk5RWg5SExSRGxGT2E5eElCSzByT0FPMW9wRHMyT0xXellhMnIzNUJJN21OWElnNjlJNVl0RkNBeXJOZlRrbXUyWkFsN0Z5SjlRcS9tc1pMdUlqUlhBd04wQ1ZmVU9qR2c9S0/bWJ2cFdBNzhZZEU2TXp0WGtiNERTem9hUFJYWXc4S2N2OGVEdEdvRDI5UT0S1) Friend, Many of you know this, but it bears repeating: During the legally mandated fundraising freeze, we didn't raise a dime from December through the end of April, while Washington state's legislature was in session. During that time, we proved the power of the movement we've built together. Together, we realized one of the most historic, progressive sessions Washington, or any state for that matter, has ever seen. Now, session is over, and we've got some catching up to do to keep our progress (on climate, economic justice, and so much more) moving full steam ahead. **[So before our first end-of-month deadline since session, please chip in right away to keep the momentum going.](https://links.e.jayinslee.com/els/v2/78V3hw0jyytY/T2prQ2lKdzRKbkk5RWg5SExSRGxGT2E5eElCSzByT0FPMW9wRHMyT0xXellhMnIzNUJJN21OWElnNjlJNVl0RkNBeXJOZlRrbXUyWkFsN0Z5SjlRcS9tc1pMdUlqUlhBd04wQ1ZmVU9qR2c9S0/bWJ2cFdBNzhZZEU2TXp0WGtiNERTem9hUFJYWXc4S2N2OGVEdEdvRDI5UT0S1)** _If you 've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_ | | [$1 ->](https://links.e.jayinslee.com/els/v2/j~ejh-gvKKH9/T2prQ2lKdzRKbkk5RWg5SExSRGxGT2E5eElCSzByT0FPMW9wRHMyT0xXellhMnIzNUJJN21OWElnNjlJNVl0RkNBeXJOZlRrbXUyWkFsN0Z5SjlRcS9tc1pMdUlqUlhBd04wQ1ZmVU9qR2c9S0/bWJ2cFdBNzhZZEU2TXp0WGtiNERTem9hUFJYWXc4S2N2OGVEdEdvRDI5UT0S1)

A lot's changed since the last time we had an official fundraising deadline: President Joe Biden moved into the White House. More than 165 million Americans have received at least one dose against COVID-19 (we've administered over 4.2 million first doses here in Washington state). And here in Washington state, we achieved concrete policy wins that we've been working toward for years. Things like:
* Passing the Climate Commitment Act and Clean Fuel Standard to cut carbon emissions and create new, local jobs in clean energy
* Passing a capital gains tax to make our regressive tax system fairer
* Putting more money in the pockets of working families by funding the Working Families Tax Credit

This historic legislative session showed how much we can accomplish when we work together. But we still have so much progress left to make -- and just because session is over doesn't mean that we can rest! If we are going to recover better, we must all continue pushing for progress.
**[So today, I'm asking: Will you rush a donation before our official May fundraising deadline (today!) to keep building progress and this movement alongside me?](https://links.e.jayinslee.com/els/v2/78V3hw0jyytY/T2prQ2lKdzRKbkk5RWg5SExSRGxGT2E5eElCSzByT0FPMW9wRHMyT0xXellhMnIzNUJJN21OWElnNjlJNVl0RkNBeXJOZlRrbXUyWkFsN0Z5SjlRcS9tc1pMdUlqUlhBd04wQ1ZmVU9qR2c9S0/bWJ2cFdBNzhZZEU2TXp0WGtiNERTem9hUFJYWXc4S2N2OGVEdEdvRDI5UT0S1)**
Thank you for contributing to our profound progress these last few years -- and for whatever you're able to give to keep it going.
Very truly yours,
Jay

[DONATE](https://links.e.jayinslee.com/els/v2/NazRs347NNtm/T2prQ2lKdzRKbkk5RWg5SExSRGxGT2E5eElCSzByT0FPMW9wRHMyT0xXellhMnIzNUJJN21OWElnNjlJNVl0RkNBeXJOZlRrbXUyWkFsN0Z5SjlRcS9tc1pMdUlqUlhBd04wQ1ZmVU9qR2c9S0/bWJ2cFdBNzhZZEU2TXp0WGtiNERTem9hUFJYWXc4S2N2OGVEdEdvRDI5UT0S1)

clean_body: He’s asking for your help... | Authorized by Elect Republicans HQ Peter, Did you see Republican Leader Kevin McCarthy’s message this morning? “I’m partnering with Elise and House GOP Whip Steve Scalise to launch a NATIONWIDE fundraising blitz to make sure ALL our campaign operations are 100% funded. “I’m asking you to help us win back the House for Trump with a contribution of any size before the end of the day. “Conservatives must be united. If we move forward as a team, we will sweep key battleground races, defend President Trump’s legacy, and stop the Socialist Biden-Pelosi agenda. But we can’t do it alone. “That’s why I’m coming directly to you and humbly asking for your support.” \-- House GOP Leader Kevin McCarthy Kevin McCarthy is pleading for Grassroots Republicans to step up and get involved, Peter. | | | | | | | | | | House Republicans are in a STRONG position to defeat Nancy Pelosi, Peter -- but first they have to overcome a HUGE fundraising deficit. We’re racing to help them by raising another $110,784, but the fact is that we can’t make it there without your help. | | | | | | | | | Thank you. Republican Action Alerts Sent via Elect Republicans

name: Isa Djerassi
subject: crucial
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Spanberger for Congress
body:
| Hi Peter, it's Isa from Team Spanberger.

I wanted to make sure you saw the message Whitney sent yesterday. We have a crucial deadline coming up at the end of the month, and [I hope you'll consider helping us reach our goal.](https://act.myngp.com/el/XBA3FGwv-5QnsHnbEA-cRu9JUrvxI_drABBE2k3sn6w=/ZXsrYtBTLNt0Ds44dk204adJEZBlYzJqFLnPvDSe3yk=?refcode=BLU-SPAN-20210528-1-EM&amount=25)
---
| [CONTRIBUTE BEFORE DEADLINE ](https://act.myngp.com/el/XBA3FGwv-5QnsHnbEA-cRu9JUrvxI_drABBE2k3sn6w=/ZXsrYtBTLNt0Ds44dk204adJEZBlYzJqFLnPvDSe3yk=?refcode=BLU-SPAN-20210528-1-EM&amount=25)
---
Being on Abigail's team is a great honor. I know she is fighting for Virginians every day in Congress, and together, we can help her continue to do this important work.

Thank you, and please make sure to read Whitney's message if you haven't already!

_Isa Djerassi_
Finance Associate \----- Forwarded Message -----
| [](https://act.myngp.com/el/XBA3FGwv-5QnsHnbEA-cRu9JUrvxI_drABBE2k3sn6w=/ZXsrYtBTLNt0Ds44dk204adJEZBlYzJqFLnPvDSe3yk=?refcode=BLU-SPAN-20210528-1-EM&amount=25)
---
| Peter,

Recently, one of the most reputable election rating sites, Crystal Ball, announced that Abigail's seat is currently considered a pure toss-up in 2022.

This swing seat will be hard to defend, especially as dark money groups are already spending hundreds of thousands of dollars to spread lies about Abigail.

**As Abigail 's finance director, it's my job to be candid about this race. We are up against some opponents with deep pockets, and in a race that's bound to be neck-and-neck, every dollar counts.

[_That 's why I'm asking if you'd consider a contribution ahead of our end-of-month deadline to defend this seat and keep Abigail in Congress. ->_](https://act.myngp.com/el/XBA3FGwv-5QnsHnbEA-cRu9JUrvxI_drABBE2k3sn6w=/ZXsrYtBTLNt0Ds44dk204adJEZBlYzJqFLnPvDSe3yk=?refcode=BLU-SPAN-20210528-1-EM&amount=25)**

name: Heidi St. John
subject: Our team is growing!
body:
Be a part of the team that will make a difference.
---
| | | | | |
---
| Hi Friends!
I have been so blessed by the outpouring of support for my Congressional run. Our volunteer list has doubled in the last week, we have Field Directors for each county, and I have had the pleasure of personally visiting with the amazing people of District 3 at one meet and greet after another. The event at Rhett's Ranch in Chinook was such an encouraging time visiting with citizens ready to get off the bench and join the fight!!
The Heidi St. John For Congress Facebook and Instagram pages have been rapidly growing and this is all thanks to you. By working together as a team, we are fighting for this country and our rights as families. We must protect our children and I am committed to leading that fight! If you aren't following the campaign on social media, you can find links to both pages below. You don't want to miss important updates, videos, articles, and interviews as they are released.
My national speaking tour has us in Florida this weekend, connecting with other like-minded conservatives desperate to turn this country around. Friends, we are not alone. There are people all over the nation just like you, willing to invest in the fight for the most important thing in our district and our country...our children.
It is going to take a lot of money to win this race and I cannot do it without your support. Your donation is an investment in protecting what we know made America great.
There are 431 days until the primary. We have to take this country back and I am your Conservative voice in the fight!
---

name: Pramila Jayapal
subject: It’s clear: we must nix the filibuster.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Pramila for Congress
body:
This is a danger to our democracy.
#
Peter, I was worried about this happening...and it just happened.
**Senate Republicans used the filibuster today to block the creation of a Commission to fully investigate the deadly January 6 attack on the Capitol.** 54 Senators voted in favor of the investigation — so we can find out exactly what happened, stop it from ever happening again, and hold all those responsible accountable. But the GOP was able to block the majority-approved Commission from passing, because of the filibuster. **So what do we do now? END the filibuster.**
**[If you agree with me that we need to end the filibuster and hold the GOP fully accountable for the deadly attack on our country, please support my work today. Chip in $3 or anything at all to fuel this urgent effort to end the filibuster and protect our democracy.](https://act.pramilaforcongress.com/go/2782?refcode=em20210528-329&t=19&akid=329%2E420207%2E260HTD)**
**[Contribute](https://act.pramilaforcongress.com/go/2782?refcode=em20210528-329&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=20&akid=329%2E420207%2E260HTD)**
If we do not end the filibuster right away, our democracy will only face greater threats. The GOP’s shameless efforts to hide what happened on January 6 and protect those who fueled the attack, like Donald Trump and Ted Cruz, will hinder our ability to stop the next attack. And with the filibuster in place, our Democratic majority won’t be able to pass critical reforms to safeguard our democracy — like voter protections, getting big money out of politics, gun violence prevention measures, and more. It’s clear: we must nix the filibuster.
**[I won’t stop fighting for accountability for what happened on January 6 — and I won’t stop fighting for our democracy. Chip in $3 right now to help fuel my fight to end the filibuster >>](https://act.pramilaforcongress.com/go/2782?refcode=em20210528-329&t=21&akid=329%2E420207%2E260HTD)**
In solidarity,
Pramila

**[Contribute](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/pj-email-footer?refcode=em20210528-329-footer&t=22&refcode2=329_420207_260HTD&akid=329%2E420207%2E260HTD)**

This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is the most important way we keep in touch with people like you, and small-dollar contributions sustain our movement for transformative change. To contribute by check, please address to Pramila for Congress, PO Box 21912, Seattle, WA 98111.

name: Patrick Leahy
subject: The GOP just voted against a bipartisan commission to investigate January 6th's Capitol insurrection
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Green Mountain PAC,
body:
Incredulous.

| [](https://links.e.leahyforvermont.) Friend, I wanted to send you a quick update: **Just now, Mitch McConnell blocked a bill that would 've created a _bipartisan_ commission to investigate the insurrection at the Capitol on January 6.** To be honest, I am incredulous. Despite bipartisan outrage the day of and days immediately after the insurrection, many Republicans have changed their tune and stopped this bipartisan commission in its tracks. That makes me even more committed than ever to expanding our Senate majority next year -- but we are up against a well-funded Republican machine that is taking its cues from Donald Trump. **[Donate today to Green Mountain PAC's "Expand the Senate Majority Fund." Now, Mitch McConnell is vocally opposing it, putting new pressure on other Republicans in the Senate to also vote against it.
Senator McConnell and his party have not only cynically abdicated any responsibility for what happened on that day but are now actively standing in the way of a bipartisan investigation that would review the events of that fateful day, the steps that led up to it, and recommendations for the future.

**3\. The best defense against GOP treachery is a Democratic governor.** If we win this race and flip Arizona blue, I'll be able to stop the GOP in their tracks, prevent them from sabotaging future elections and – together – we can restore the promise of Arizona.
Friend, we have a once-in-a-generation chance to flip this state and stop these outrageous GOP attacks before they destroy any more of Arizona's potential. And Nate Silver's FiveThirtyEight _confirms_ we can win.

name: Team Erica Smith
subject: Update
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Erica Smith for US Senate 2022
body:
Erica can’t win this race alone.
#
You’re an important member of our moral movement. So, we wanted to give you a campaign update before you log off for the holiday weekend.
On Monday, Erica is facing a vital end-of-month fundraising deadline. **Our numbers are not where they to be to hit our $7,000 goal and have the resources to kick-start our statewide voter outreach efforts in June — but we’re close. Take a look:**
[](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/es-em20210528-1?refcode=em20210528-120&t=1&refcode2=120_3698_wo-HT8&akid=120%2E3698%2Ewo-HT8)
2022 is shaping up to be the most important midterm election of our lifetime, and the race for North Carolina’s Senate seat will determine who controls the Senate.
Erica is an educator, a minister, a mother of four, and a three-term state senator — we can’t miss our chance to elect a leader like Erica to the Senate. Someone who knows what it’s like to struggle. Someone who has spent her life fighting for working people. Someone with integrity and know-how.
Erica can’t win this race alone. It’s going to take a massive grassroots movement (_and a lot of money_) to flip North Carolina’s Republican-held, open seat. That’s why it’s critical we hit each and every one of our fundraising goals.
[**_Our fundraising has slowed down this week, and we have a $560 gap to fill before Monday’s deadline. But, we can get back on track if we receive a huge boost of support right now. So, before you log off for the long weekend, will you make a $5 contribution to Erica Smith for U.S. Senate?_**](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/es-em20210528-1?refcode=em20210528-120&t=21&refcode2=120_3698_wo-HT8&akid=120%2E3698%2Ewo-HT8)
**[Donate »](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/es-em20210528-1?refcode=em20210528-120&t=22&refcode2=120_3698_wo-HT8&akid=120%2E3698%2Ewo-HT8)**
Thank you for your support, and have a great weekend!
Team Erica Smith

**[Donate](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/es-emails?refcode=em20210528-120-footer&t=23&refcode2=120_3698_wo-HT8&akid=120%2E3698%2Ewo-HT8)**
---
Email us: [info@ericaforus.com](mailto: info@ericaforus.com)
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is the most important way we keep in touch with people like you, so thank you for reading to the end. Grassroots donors like you keep us going. To contribute via check, please address to Erica for Us, P.O. Box 1236, Gaston, NC 27832.
* [Receive Fewer Emails](https://act.ericaforus.com/signup/receive-fewer-emails/)
* [Update My Personal Information](https://act.ericaforus.com/signup/did-your-information-change/?t=24&akid=120%2E3698%2Ewo-HT8)
* [Unsubscribe](https://act.ericaforus.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=25&akid=120%2E3698%2Ewo-HT8)

Paid for by Erica Smith for US Senate 2022

We couldn't make it any more clear -- there's a path to expanding the Democratic majority in the Senate and it runs straight through Wisconsin. **Right now, we have a tied 50-50 majority and defeating Ron Johnson in 2022 could be the tipping point we need.**

The key to winning is making sure we don't fall behind on our monthly fundraising goals. And right now, we're not where we need to be. [**Pitch in $5, or whatever you can, before our end-of-month fundraising deadline on Sunday to help us flip this seat and expand the Senate majority.**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/29915861/287924983/-49048448?gpsid=50_130_19077&refcode=em21_210528_EOM4_fnd_gq_act__ts_ettx&utm_campaign=em21_210528_EOM4_fnd_gq_act__ts_ettx&utm_medium=email&utm_source=sgod&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84ODI4NSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIyNzhkMWNhNC0wY2MwLWViMTEtYTdhZC01MDFhYzU3YjhmYTciLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=HrHTfOS5lzp95lf9wnzdfN6yQD2F_yr3-k9uQwEDh-4=)

disclaimer_text: Paid for by Alexandria Ocasio-Cortez for Congress
body:
When we say we rely on grassroots funding more than anyone, we mean it.
# [](https://act.ocasiocortez.com/go/143?refcode=em20210528-2144-header&t=1&akid=2144%2E2526796%2E5C72AN)
Here’s a fact that you may not know:
**82% of all the money we’ve raised to date has come from small-dollar donors.**
Running a grassroots campaign like this depends on people pitching in – whether that’s $5, $15, or $50 – whenever they can. Less than half of one percent of people reading any given email donate. But that revenue makes up 40% of all our fundraising.
**[Can you please make your first contribution of $3 or anything you can today to get our campaign to our goal and power this movement to keep Alexandria fighting for working people in Congress?](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/aoc-email-20210528-2?refcode=em20210528-2144-P&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=3&refcode2=2144_2526796_5C72AN&akid=2144%2E2526796%2E5C72AN)**
**[Contribute $3](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/aoc-email-20210528-2?refcode=em20210528-2144-P&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=22&refcode2=2144_2526796_5C72AN&akid=2144%2E2526796%2E5C72AN)**
Small-dollar donors have created a movement that was able to raise $5 million for urgent relief when Texas faced devastating winter storms, raised thousands for our neighbors in Queens who were displaced by two massive fires, and built a tutoring program in New York to help provide support for families who were juggling working from home and remote learning for their kids.
This is a movement for the people by the people. But, in order to keep building, we need to hit every single one of our monthly fundraising goals that we’ve set for this year. **And right now, we need to raise 15,000 more contributions in the next three days in order to hit our May targets.**
**[We have just three days to hit our goal. If you’re able to, please make your first $3 contribution right now to get our campaign to our target and power our movement forward.](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/aoc-email-20210528-2?refcode=em20210528-2144-P&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=23&refcode2=2144_2526796_5C72AN&akid=2144%2E2526796%2E5C72AN)**
Thank you,
Team AOC

**[Donate](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/aoc-email-20210528-2?refcode=em20210528-2144-P&t=24&refcode2=2144_2526796_5C72AN&akid=2144%2E2526796%2E5C72AN)**
---
[](https://www.facebook.com/OcasioCortez/?t=25&akid=2144%2E2526796%2E5C72AN) | [](https://twitter.com/AOC?t=26&akid=2144%2E2526796%2E5C72AN) | [](https://www.instagram.com/aoc/?t=27&akid=2144%2E2526796%2E5C72AN)
Email us: [us@ocasiocortez.com](mailto: us@ocasiocortez.com)
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is the most important way we keep in touch with people like you, so thank you for reading to the end. Small donors like you keep us going. To contribute via check, please address to Alexandria Ocasio-Cortez for Congress, PO Box 680080, Corona, NY 11368.

name: =?utf-8?Q?Indiana=20Republican=20Party?=
subject: A True Honor
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the Indiana Republican Party
body:
A few weeks ago in this space I wrote about my excitement to get back on the road again. | | | [View this email in your browser](https://mailchi.mp/indiana/the-resiliency-of-hoosiers-470518?e=1acd9bb3d6)
---
| |
---
|
---
|
---
| _**A True Honor**_ A few weeks ago in this space I wrote about my excitement to get back on the road again. Well, I had an unexpected opportunity to travel a little farther this week. It was a true honor to travel with Governor Holcomb on his trip this week to Israel. Invited by Prime Minister Benjamin Netanyahu, Governor Holcomb returned to Israel to show Hoosier support for our friend and ally during this challenging time. He is the first governor to visit the country in over a year and the first US elected official to visit since Hamas resumed their rocket attacks on Israel. We were only in country for a couple days, but it’s an experience I’ll carry with me for the rest of my life. To not only show support for Israel, one of our country’s greatest allies, but to experience the history and vibrancy of Jerusalem and walk the same steps as Christ was truly moving.

Indiana has developed a deep friendship with Israel. Culturally, economically, and personally the ties between our state and that nation are strong. When the Prime Minister invited Governor Holcomb to visit and show support, the governor did not hesitate to go. When your friend asks for support, you provide that support enthusiastically. Governor Holcomb left no doubt this week where he and Indiana stands when it comes to Israel.

Thanks Kyle

**Photo** : _Chairman Hupfer meets Israeli Prime Minister Benjamin Netanyahu this week in Jerusalem_
---
|
---
| | **Governor Holcomb's Week That Was**
---
| [ ](https://indgop.us11.list-manage.com/track/click?u=89fb3de929a99eecb88e6fb27&id=0f305a906e&e=1acd9bb3d6)
---
|
---
| _**Invitation Accepted**_ This week, **Governor Holcomb** was invited by Prime Minister Benjamin Netanyahu to visit Israel and show Hoosier support for one of our closest allies during this time of need. Under **Governor Holcomb's** leadership Indiana and Hoosiers have developed strong personal and business relationships with Israel.
_**“I stand in support of Israel and look forward to meeting with Prime Minister Netanyahu to continue forging an even stronger Israel-Indiana bond. When I was invited, I did not hesitate to make this trip to meet in Israel during such an hour of need.” -Governor Holcomb**_
**Governor Holcomb** also attended the American Legion's Memorial Day event. This Memorial Day we will honor the men and women who paid the ultimate sacrifice for our nation's freedom.

_**Photos:**_ _Governor Holcomb inspects damage done by a Hamas rocket in Jerusalem. Governor Holcomb and Chairman Hupfer visit an Iron Dome installation._
---
|
---
|
---
| _**Memorial Day**_
Monday is Memorial Day, a time to remember the brave men and women in uniform who made the ultimate sacrifice so that we can continue to enjoy the freedoms we hold so dear.
---
|
---
| _**GOP Spring Dinner is June 11!**_
---
|
---
|
---
|
---
| _**Todd Young on IBJ podcast**_ Senator Todd Young was on the IBJ podcast to speak about his Endless Frontiers Act. Listen to the full podcast here: [https://www.ibj.com/articles/ibj-podcast-sen-todd-young-on-how-his-endless-frontier-act-could-boost-innovation-in-indiana](https://indgop.us11.list-manage.com/track/click?u=89fb3de929a99eecb88e6fb27&id=ef61f4690e&e=1acd9bb3d6)
---
|
---
| _**Upcoming Republican Events**_
[June 3](https://indgop.us11.list-manage.com/track/click?u=89fb3de929a99eecb88e6fb27&id=ef38e86d39&e=1acd9bb3d6): Kosciusko County Lincoln Day Dinner
[June 16](https://indgop.us11.list-manage.com/track/click?u=89fb3de929a99eecb88e6fb27&id=abbc49697f&e=1acd9bb3d6): 31st Annual Henry County GOP Open
[June 21](https://indgop.us11.list-manage.com/track/click?u=89fb3de929a99eecb88e6fb27&id=e482b65bec&e=1acd9bb3d6): Jasper County GOP Golf Scramble
[July 17](https://indgop.us11.list-manage.com/track/click?u=89fb3de929a99eecb88e6fb27&id=b6e670f999&e=1acd9bb3d6): Blackford County Lincoln Day Dinner

name: Rob Secaur
subject: Weekly Update from the Campaign Trail
body:
Jane Timken for Ohio Update [](https://) Dear Peter, As we move into the summer months, Jane’s America First campaign continues to build momentum. Jane continues to crisscross the state, taking her message directly to voters and listening to the issue they care most about. With campaign stops across the state, Jane continues to work hard to be your next U.S. Senator and the first female Senator from the great state of Ohio. I hope you’ll take a few minutes to learn more. **Radical Left Injecting Socialism into Every Aspect of Our Lives** On Monday, Jane penned an opinion column in the Columbus Dispatch to discuss an issue she hears from voters at nearly every campaign stop: the Radical Left attempting to inject socialism into every aspect of our lives. “More and more, we’re seeing the left push their radical agenda through critical race theory which is seeping into school systems and turning schools into centers of leftist indoctrination. Instead of teaching the facts of history – good and bad – critical race theory promotes a slanted view of America through a racial and ideological lens. While we must certainly teach empathy and how we can learn and grow as a nation, critical race theory seeks to stoke racial flames by creating a state of perpetual division between neighbors, friends, and communities.” [Read the full piece here.](http://links.janetimkenforohio.com/u/click?_t=d33702f99bd24ab29d9d703faac4f8a3&_m=f9a1a2afa5a140c9b03c37bcaef116ae&_e=ltAdcOh1GTRphDN9aOY9Jr4DyO92fOnx03ktzp7I-nUo13XnZ6V7As-v7t7b7dO18pxwGYFvxBZE-qkofaGqS41vayGKCln5YCxDPyocSfMIciMNMYD6KIjePYhV750sBiWi_eLY5TcAXmz8vTeNrgbkeVhQ10j4gOn8AWqvNjWkqwZGNrWeG8R_reBp51wesJR1PPRVYgCpif9i3M_o7WMk-P0zCyRppm9LE7MFpP_WJTIs1PWhIJsV8guwscXfGJKS4oD8WKZ4UTtdB0bJsPIvQ27ADj5yj89c3S12Iq4egp9EPlgMeHbo0YFrwGAJUv3_M45Gx7NJXg2ifs7Mmdh33mZnUnhjmvCYUwAiQQBNfWeKnqgafnqRTMUq1Nr_uzr2dLqZIdSlhaQytjazViXwDtgEFGUIct_GkSaEtGGq70cR4P3ahtsMjiQlcttQ) **From the Trail** Jane stopped by the Dublin Republican Club’s monthly meeting this week to share her vision from Ohio. The Dublin Republican Club puts on a great event and had many proud patriots come out for the event. On Wednesday night, Stark County came out to show their support for Jane. With over 150 people in attendance, Jane was thrilled by the outpouring of support from old friends and new. We were especially grateful to be joined by one of Jane’s earliest endorsers, U.S. Congressman Bob Gibbs, who pumped up the crowd before Jane’s remarks. Yesterday, Jane continued her Statewide Listening Tour. This time she was joined by supporter and State Rep. Bob Young. Jane hears from parents across the state who are furious that their school district is implementing a “woke” education agenda. **Latest Endorsements** No other candidate in this race is garnering the grassroots support that Jane is as 5 more endorsements from conservatives across Ohio endorsed her America First candidacy. “No other candidate has fought harder to elect principled conservatives and spread conservative values across Ohio than Jane Timken. Jane has worked side-by-side with grassroots leaders and business owners in all corners of the state. I embrace Jane’s American First Agenda to promote American businesses and working families across Ohio and I am honored to support her as she becomes Ohio’s next United States Senator.” — **Mark Johnson, State Representative, 92nd District** Full List of This Week’s Endorsements Rick Carfagna, State Representative, 68th District Mark Johnson, State Representative, 92nd District David Jeffers, Ross County Treasurer Michele Reynolds, Madison Township Trustee, Franklin County Kathryn Whittington, Ashtabula County Commissioner **Biden Weakness Tour** Just last week, Jane penned a [Letter to the Editor](http://links.janetimkenforohio.com/u/click?_t=d33702f99bd24ab29d9d703faac4f8a3&_m=f9a1a2afa5a140c9b03c37bcaef116ae&_e=ltAdcOh1GTRphDN9aOY9JnjD98fcvEazZi7Ocusw6TUMUQp_knr125ZUT-gtcG4Hlz7AO7UUY28zTIv5i25_cP1frgeUdT9XF8I_lpsQIwRyTJajln7qDpKMkhvUdWTKzqunQ9DWWves9kpXv_UvGjzt1QAfodBrZ4OGdi7tnxMlR5SGzCJVzH05sImOT-BrLmnb_fEeQKoL-o2BYH3C39g-ug-jTLh3ReN7okhf9UGQ74G9DuiYJeY-H0xszfWwyHxiW_Zb-Jn-fI39Ozm6C-HjIMnV8ZE4Q86wBjNk-5Wm9k3eJ7GxiRDDzjSS0BN-AiyWb8aInuAFe4k1wZReBmAdHT-XiBeESAo2K4Uq3iE02gVs2IsYP76BiDnfYB1mThcqKw4jfrIx7767Icq25Q%3D%3D) in Cleveland.com to pinpoint how Joe Biden projecting weakness is creating disastrous ramifications at home and abroad. This week, Joe Biden brought his weakness to Cleveland. While our country is facing a workforce crisis, soaring inflation, rising taxes and gas prices, and a dismal Jobs Report, all of which lay squarely at Joe Biden’s feet, Joe Biden touted his reckless spending and radical policies that prioritize Russian jobs over Ohio jobs. After losing Ohio in 2020 by the most votes of any major party candidate this century, perhaps it’s time for Joe Biden to change his script, or you know, stop coming here. I hope you and your family have a wonderful and safe Memorial Day Weekend. Sincerely, Rob Secaur Campaign Manager Jane Timken for Ohio Don't want to receive our emails anymore? [Unsubscribe](http://links.janetimkenforohio.com/e/encryptedUnsubscribe?_r=d33702f99bd24ab29d9d703faac4f8a3&_s=f9a1a2afa5a140c9b03c37bcaef116ae&_t=f93LqTYr9ag2D5dtw-gtNKpnaT5d1zR8VmdMDKMLa0hBlU68haYBO1br00iMJCcQr67olq8ndN3ja8cZj3L6qWO12IfMvfnZJrLBq5QsljXUDuPXbe2AFMb0Fw4s3wDPg-hTMKlVG9OOz6zg8Yw6MzUGMP7nJLAo9zkjSsxCz18%3D) | | [](http://links.janetimkenforohio.com/u/click?_t=d33702f99bd24ab29d9d703faac4f8a3&_m=f9a1a2afa5a140c9b03c37bcaef116ae&_e=ltAdcOh1GTRphDN9aOY9JoWdlw6otSjPO7heHckfrKN3PsuEG2HR-z90oEtj7TLodk4QEpoGKemNMMn9onVCG55IpQBkto8bY-6R9SqixENLfRiJrjpjucPHK9naFLBE2fFOyRj_fisxL1YWvKIlNNQzbfWilbVmah8yHNgO7oRCSeOqaQinfLK-YIt_JiQa18f8dkDgyErY4evCXlDo3J60Mguvi3EdNFsqY_q6OCqNTJcHKUSvjsEU9AZk85ETyDjwMUT3tpT-2vHsOBFMPmPGxk_ooheOH3WSyUqhgEg%3D) | [](http://links.janetimkenforohio.com/u/click?_t=d33702f99bd24ab29d9d703faac4f8a3&_m=f9a1a2afa5a140c9b03c37bcaef116ae&_e=RdZun6lDwzH3Br3F98pJciWNa9XG1madxmNmUFO2K0z-dA4zVwHNd_Q0oCzRjNL8J_NnRyQJ-Cwf5nLtuTfgujEGry_RcuqIojO2MVLucgsTgi1RCGgQ9qnfVha4RiuGWncDGaaOXUH_HSdKPOtEmjoxsmqyBlUAc-Gijaoa8TyP15dlFoIVG_D7geOw2Gpn8k8WFU95Aa1SytOJJdMOIFj5_TJ2sHF54chD4o47W5HUU4Y2zgVDAinHe0zznFe60i_06Z1LmsTxnI2xbB4gDA%3D%3D)
